nodes.name: Error Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives errors from any workflow that has 'Error Workflow' set to this workflow. Set this as the Error Workflow in n8n Settings > Workflows > Error Workflow.

nodes.name: Create Error Task in Pulse
nodes.notes: Creates a high-priority task in Pulse so Dave sees the failure in the sidebar. Error details go into the task metadata — not the title — to keep titles clean.

meta.notes: Set this workflow as the Error Workflow in n8n Settings > Workflows > Error Workflow. All other workflows will route failures here. The dead-letter event is written to Pulse as a high-priority task — no sensitive execution data is included.
